name: House Medic
description: Tends to injuries and illness within the house. Reduces health recovery time.
dailyEffect: Deployed medics restore health daily to the most injured roster member.

name: House Steward
description: Manages the day-to-day accounts and provisioning. Reduces waste and overhead.
dailyEffect: Manages the accounts. +15 Marks per day.

name: House Trainer
description: Maintains discipline and readiness among the roster.
dailyEffect: Runs drills. Idle roster members gain skill points over time.

name: Quartermaster
description: Oversees equipment maintenance and inventory distribution.

name: Chief Engineer
description: Manages structural repairs and technical projects for the house.
dailyEffect: Oversees workshop output. Reduces material costs on district projects.
